name: Crabagent Trace
description: Ship OpenClaw agent traces to Crabagent Collector (hooks + optional cache-trace tail).

collectorBaseUrl.description: HTTPS (or http for dev) base URL of Crabagent Collector, no trailing slash.

collectorApiKey.description: Bearer / X-API-Key for Collector; must match CRABAGENT_API_KEY on collector.

memoryQueueMax.description: Max queued events in memory before oldest dropped.

sampleRateBps.description: Sample rate in basis points (10000 = 100%). Fixed per session on session_start.

cacheTracePath.description: Optional override path to cache-trace.jsonl for per-model stream:context tail.

enableCacheTraceTail.description: Tail cache-trace.jsonl for stream:context (per model call).

cacheTracePollMs.description: Poll interval for cache trace file.
